title: Marbella Stag Party: Private Boat Charter Guide 2026
topic: private boat charter stag in Marbella
html:
Planning a stag do in Marbella? A private boat charter from Puerto Banús offers the ultimate party venue on the Mediterranean, with prices typically ranging from €1,200 to €4,000 for a half-day, depending on the vessel. BoatHire24 connects you directly with local operators for a seamless booking experience.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella's coastline offers several excellent departure points for your stag charter. Puerto Banús is the most famous, with its luxury yachts and vibrant nightlife. Other real options include the main Marbella Marina, Cabopino Marina just east of town, and the nearby port of Estepona to the west. For a quieter start, consider the small harbour at San Pedro Alcántara. You can rent a boat in a few minutes.

From Puerto Banús, you can head to the exclusive beach clubs of the Golden Mile, or cruise south to Cabo Pino and its pine-backed dunes. A popular trip is to sail eastwards to the Punta de Calaburras lighthouse, about 5 nautical miles. One option worth a look is the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski for hire.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht, best for a luxury stag party with onboard bar and sun deck, up to 12 guests, from €2,500 half-day.
  2. Catamaran, spacious and stable for large groups, perfect for lounging and swimming, up to 12 guests, from €1,800 half-day.
  3. Rib with jet ski, ideal for adrenaline-fuelled parties, includes a towed tender, up to 8 guests, from €1,200 half-day.
  4. Day cruiser, a more affordable option for a small stag group, versatile for coastal exploration, up to 6 guests, from €800 half-day.

For an extra thrill, consider the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski for hire, which can be added to your charter or rented separately for high-speed fun between anchorages.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Prices vary by vessel type and duration, but you can expect to pay between €800 and €4,000 for a half-day private charter. Below is a typical price breakdown: You can also see more at check availability.

  • Shared sunset tour from €70 per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests) from €500.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests) from €2,500.
  • Luxury crewed yacht full-day from €3,500.

To compare verified boat listings, you can rent a boat through the platform's detailed filters. To see how booking works, visit the boat search.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For private charters with a skipper, no licence is required; if you wish to self-drive, you will need a valid boating licence recognised in Spain. Spanish regulations typically require the ‘Licencia de Navegación’ for small motorboats, but most stag parties opt for a skippered charter to focus on fun. The operator confirms exact requirements at booking, so you can relax. For a self-drive option, use the boat search to filter by licence requirements.

If you are in a large group, consider a catamaran for Marbella stag parties because the wide trampolines and shaded saloon offer room for everyone to socialise without feeling crowded.

At a glance

  • Price band: €70 per person to €4,000 for a yacht
  • Peak months: June, July, August, and September
  • Trip length: half-day (4h) or full-day (8h)
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests per vessel
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

What is included in a private charter in Marbella?

Most private charters include the crew (skipper and host), fuel, and basic equipment like snorkelling gear and a cooler.

Can we bring our own food and drink?

Yes, most operators allow you to bring your own supplies, though many offer catering packages for an extra fee.

What is the alcohol policy on board?

Drinking is allowed but must be done responsibly; the skipper will always ensure safety and may refuse service if needed.

How far in advance should we book for a 2026 stag?

Booking at least 4-6 weeks ahead is advisable, especially for July and August, to secure your preferred boat.

Ready to plan the ultimate stag party? Visit BoatHire24 to check availability on private boats in Marbella for summer 2026. Boat owners can also list their vessels to attract groups.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
